<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see http://redis.io/commands/migrate */ class MIGRATE extends RedisCommand { /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function getId() { return 'MIGRATE'; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function setArguments(array $arguments) { if (is_array(end($arguments))) { foreach (array_pop($arguments) as $modifier => $value) { $modifier = strtoupper($modifier); if ($modifier === 'COPY' && $value == true) { $arguments[] = $modifier; } if ($modifier === 'REPLACE' && $value == true) { $arguments[] = $modifier; } } } parent::setArguments($arguments); } }
